name: Deathseeker
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

Attack Skills(except E.G.O Skills) that inflict [Burst] Potency or Count gain Clash Power +1, 'Offense Level' +2, and deal +15% damage.


Single-Coin Skills gain Clash Power +2, 'Offense Level' +2, and deal +40% damage instead.
